notes: Core mechanics present but enemies never properly return to formation after diving (state stays 'returning' forever), formation layout is sparse/incorrect, no tractor beam mechanic, visual sprites are primitive blobs rather than recognizable Galaga sprites, and the dt scaling is inconsistent (dt is ~0.016 but used as pixel multiplier causing very slow movement).
Impressive bezier curve entry paths, but a fatal logic omission (no 'returning' state handler) causes enemies to get permanently stuck off-screen after diving, softlocking the game.
Basic shooting and enemy waves exist, but several Galaga mechanics are missing or incorrect, movement/timing ignore dt, and the presentation is only a loose approximation of Galaga.
